interlinearizer.project.label: %interlinearizer_menu_column_project%
interlinearizer.project.localizeNotes: Interlinearizer top menu column for project actions

items.label: %interlinearizer_openSelectProjectModal%
items.localizeNotes: Interlinearizer top menu > Open the project selector to switch to or manage existing interlinear projects

items.label: %interlinearizer_openNewProjectModal%
items.localizeNotes: Interlinearizer top menu > Create a brand-new interlinear project for the current source project

items.label: %interlinearizer_openProjectInfoModal%
items.localizeNotes: Interlinearizer top menu > View and edit metadata for the active interlinearizer project, or delete it

items.label: %interlinearizer_save%
items.localizeNotes: Interlinearizer top menu > Save the current draft to the active project

items.label: %interlinearizer_saveAs%
items.localizeNotes: Interlinearizer top menu > Save the draft to a new project or overwrite an existing one

items.label: %interlinearizer_wipeBook%
items.localizeNotes: Interlinearizer top menu > Remove the current book's analysis from the draft

items.label: %interlinearizer_wipeDraft%
items.localizeNotes: Interlinearizer top menu > Remove all analysis from the draft

items.label: %interlinearizer_openForProject%
items.localizeNotes: Scripture Editor top menu > Open Interlinearizer for this project
